text: Most of your serotonin isn't in your brain. Did you know that over 90% is produced in your gut? It's not just about happiness. Serotonin regulates digestion, mood, and even sleep cycles. It's a powerhouse. Research shows gut serotonin influences brain function, impacting mental health far beyond what's been discussed. SSRI medications target serotonin to help treat depression, but that’s only part of the story. Feeling down? It might not just be your brain at play. Your gut could be sending signals too. Want to dive deeper? Hit that follow button for more insights on serotonin!
